task_yaml.task:
Please open the video file:
/tmp_workspace/clawbench/sources/clip.mp4

You must actually play, watch, and listen to the local video clip, then
transcribe it yourself. Do not download existing subtitles, scripts, movie
dialogue transcripts, or rely on movie knowledge; the final subtitles and
timeline must be based on this local video.

Please generate a subtitle file for the first 180 seconds of the video and
save it as:
/tmp_workspace/results/clip.srt

Requirements:
1. Process only 0:00-3:00
2. Use standard SRT format
3. If there is a long stretch without dialogue at the beginning, do not force
   subtitles into it; mark subtitles only when there is actual spoken content
4. After finishing, watch these 180 seconds again and check whether the
   subtitles match the timing of speech on screen
5. If necessary, modify the original file directly; do not save an extra
   separate version

If `/tmp_workspace/results/` does not exist, create it first.
